stemHtml: Which statement about the Flight Mode Annunciator (FMA) is correct?

options.a: Every mode change is accompanied by a recognisable aural indication.
options.b: A mode change is indicated by a series of gong sounds, normally four (4).
options.c: When the mode is changed, a caption appears on the Primary Flight Display (PFD) that reads "MODE CHG".
options.d: If the mode changes, a caption on the Primary Flight Display (PFD) will change colour or appearance.
